overview: A full-stack Job Portal web app where Job Seekers can browse and apply to jobs, Employers can post jobs and manage applications, and Admins can oversee the platform. Built with Internet Identity authentication, dual user profiles, and a clean professional interface.
features: Internet Identity login with Job Seeker and Employer roles
Job Seeker profiles with skills, experience, and bio
Employer company profiles with name, description, and website
Job posting with title, description, skills, location, salary, and job type
My Applications tracking page for seekers
Admin panel to view all users and companies
